title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
